title: My Parents Stole My $400K Inheritance, Told Everyone I Did Drugs. So I Foreclosed On Him.
description: My parents forged my signature, stole my $400,000 inheritance for my brother's failing business, and told the whole family I blew it on drugs. A decade later, I bought the debt for $12,000, foreclosed on his house, and sold it at auction while he watched. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed
thumb_text: I BOUGHT THE DEBT AND FORECLOSED ON HIM

thumb_lines.text: THEY TOLD EVERYONE I DID DRUGS
THEY FORGED MY SIGNATURE AND STOLE MY $400K TRUST
AND SOLD IT WHILE HE WATCHED
